label: E1_tuned_v3
defects: Timbre slightly less dark and dense than reference.
Specific character of roughness/rasp does not fully match Cyclops.
Synthetic character feels too modern/clean, lacking older PA quality.
Modulation artifacts less prominent than reference.
strengths: Strong sense of calm procedural authority.
model_notes: The base voice quality is deep and clear with a present, but distinct, synthetic character that leans towards modern AI.
